display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official WeeChat site; source_facts.name is weechat.
docs_sources: Official WeeChat website has a dedicated documentation page.
repo_sources: Official WeeChat project source repository is hosted under the weechat GitHub organization; source_facts.homepage identifies the official project.
